title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Unknown person #3, Wano Citizens as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said that we were protected by open

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's hard to suddenly change your mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The Lord idiot who rebelled against the Shogun will die."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what everyone understood, and this is how the sentence will be executed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took the floor and was ready to face the consequences, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a vassal of open-sama and I will live or die like him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If this is the case then...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I'm ready to die with the Kozuki!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and external- Nate you next time!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Sh...shogun Orochi, please end this punishment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He was shot by an arrow!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The crowd instantly understood how scary someone seeking revenge can be.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: There was no longer "hope" for Wano....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this "punishment which dragged on in length"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people realized this while the subordinates of Kaido and Crochi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The reason for Oden's strange actions these last 5 years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was quickly communicated to all the people of wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he was the one who saved us that day?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we need to warn the leaders of the provinces of wano of something important we use arrows on which we hang a message

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: These arrows can cross huge distances.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The oil in the pot was heated to over 700 degrees, and it kept increasing.

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: We knew nothing, sorry for insulting you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a little late, bunch of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're welcome, I'm doing my best!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
